name: AI Personal Finance Coach
text: AI-powered personal finance assistant that analyzes spending, builds budgets, and suggests investment strategies for young professionals.

name: Remote Team Analytics
text: B2B SaaS that aggregates tool usage across Slack, Jira, and GitHub to surface team productivity patterns and risks.

name: AR STEM Classroom
text: Augmented reality learning platform that turns STEM concepts into interactive 3D experiences for K-12 students.

name: Local Services Marketplace
text: Two-sided marketplace connecting homeowners with vetted local professionals for repairs and improvements.

name: API Observability Cloud
text: Developer-first observability platform focused on API latency, reliability, and contract testing.

name: Generic AI Dashboard
text: Horizontal AI dashboard that tried to be everything for everyone with weak differentiation and no clear ICP.

name: Chronic Care Companion
text: Digital health companion app that tracks symptoms, meds, and care plans for patients with chronic conditions.

name: SMB Revenue-Based Financing
text: Financing platform that advances capital to SaaS SMBs based on recurring revenue, repaid as a percentage of future revenue.

name: UGC Game Platform
text: Cross-platform game creation toolkit that lets players build and share mini-games with friends.

name: Audio-first Communities
text: Vertical social network built around recurring audio rooms for niche professional communities.
